attachments.text:
Since Android 12 a splash screen is now enforced during every cold start of your application. By default, the app displays the icon and dismisses the splash screen when the new frame is available.

<https://developer.android.com/develop/ui/views/launch/splash-screen|Android docs> show how to manage this new feature with Android Studio and Java programming, but it is possible to do the same with Fuse?
attachments.title: Android 12+ app icon splash screen [How-to Discussions]
